# cloudfly_instance_price (Data Source)

Queries the CloudFly API for the price of an instance configuration. Note: this data source issues a POST on every read/refresh.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudfly_instance_price" "example" {
  flavor_type = "Standard"
  ram         = 1
  disk        = 20
  vcpus       = 1
  region      = "HN-Cloud01"
  image_name  = "CentOS-7.9"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `disk` (Number)
- `flavor_type` (String)
- `image_name` (String)
- `ram` (Number)
- `region` (String)
- `vcpus` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `price_per_hour` (Number)
- `price_per_month` (Number)
